summary: Pass 2 attempted to compress the output from Pass 1, but Pass 1 itself produced no output at all. The original task was to evaluate rich input field libraries (TipTap, Lexical, CodeMirror 6, Monaco Editor, and Plate) against 7 feature criteria and produce a recommendation. The Pass 1 agent failed entirely — it returned an empty response with no analysis, no comparison matrix, no recommendation document, and no examination of the project's tech stack. No files were created or modified during Pass 1. This pass (Pass 2) is documenting the failure so that the next pass can re-attempt the full research task from scratch.
